_description: 2025-2026 design conventions for pattern gap analysis. Each pattern is checked against scraped site data to identify modernization opportunities.

patterns.name: Bento Grid Layouts
patterns.description: Asymmetric card grids replacing uniform icon+text rows. Size variation creates visual hierarchy.
patterns.directive: Use CSS Grid with asymmetric column sizes (e.g., 2fr 1fr, 1fr 1.3fr) for feature sections instead of uniform card rows.

patterns.name: Translucent Navigation
patterns.description: backdrop-blur + 8-12% background opacity on fixed/sticky navbars. Fully opaque navs read as dated.
patterns.directive: Use backdrop-filter: blur(12px) with background-color at 80-90% opacity on the main navigation bar.

patterns.name: Dark Mode Support
patterns.description: prefers-color-scheme media query or theme toggle. Light-only sites miss ~30% user preference.
patterns.directive: Include CSS custom properties for colors and a prefers-color-scheme: dark media query with inverted palette.

patterns.name: Gradient Text on Headlines
patterns.description: Single accent gradient on one word/phrase in the hero headline. Overused but contemporary when restrained.
patterns.directive: Apply a restrained gradient (2 brand colors) to one key word in the hero headline using background-clip: text.

patterns.name: SVG Section Separators
patterns.description: Organic curves or diagonal clips replacing hard horizontal lines between sections.
patterns.directive: Use SVG curve paths or clip-path: polygon() to create organic transitions between major sections.

patterns.name: Large Number Social Proof
patterns.description: Stats in 72-96px weight-900 type for social proof sections (10,000+ users, 99.9% uptime).
patterns.directive: Display key metrics in oversized (4-6rem) bold type with a brief label beneath each number.

patterns.name: Scroll-Triggered Animations
patterns.description: IntersectionObserver-driven fade/slide animations on scroll. Static pages feel flat.
patterns.directive: Add IntersectionObserver-based fade-in-up animations to section headings, cards, and images as they enter viewport.

patterns.name: Glassmorphism / Frosted Glass
patterns.description: Semi-transparent backgrounds with blur for cards or overlays. Gives depth without heavy shadows.
patterns.directive: Use frosted glass effect (backdrop-filter: blur, semi-transparent bg) on feature cards or pricing tables for visual depth.

patterns.name: Micro-Interactions on CTAs
patterns.description: Hover states with scale, shadow shift, or color transitions on buttons and interactive elements.
patterns.directive: Add subtle hover transitions (transform: translateY(-2px), box-shadow increase) to buttons and interactive cards.

patterns.name: Variable Font Usage
patterns.description: Single variable font file instead of multiple weights. Better performance and smoother transitions.
patterns.directive: Use variable fonts where available (Inter, DM Sans) for smoother weight transitions and smaller file sizes.
